name: Google Sites
description: Google's website-building tool for creating simple internal and public sites without code, part of Google Workspace.

years.notes: 2026 Workspace refresh — Google Sites mark debuts a binder/document silhouette in saturated Workspace blues (#3186FF body, #50A0FF lower fill, #9ED1FF left binder strip) with a vertical gradient binder ring (#3186FF→#A9A9FD) and a white pill detail on the right. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as a 24×24 SVG_STRING.
